placeholders.appointments: The appointment overview will be available here soon.
checklists.intro: Start with the daily breastfeeding checklist. More checklists will follow step by step.
checklists.items.schwangerschaft.hebamme: Look for a midwife early, as many are booked up quickly. She will support you before and after birth.
checklists.items.schwangerschaft.kurs.de: A course helps you understand the birth process and learn breathing and relaxation techniques.
Find out about services, distance and emergency care so you feel confident.
checklists.items.schwangerschaft.erstaus: Clarify together what is really needed. Often a small basic set is enough.
checklists.items.geburt.kliniktasche.des: Have everything ready for mother, baby and support person so you can leave quickly when labour starts.
checklists.items.geburt.geburtsplan.desc: Note your wishes for birth (e.g. pain relief, positions, bonding). It serves as a guide.
Inform a trusted person (e.g. partner or midwife) so support can be organised.
checklists.items.geburt.dokumente.desc: Keep maternity record, ID, insurance card and any other documents to hand.
checklists.items.geburt.stillinfo: Breastfeeding info for birth clinic ready
checklists.items.geburt.stillinfo.desc: Have breastfeeding information ready so the clinic can support you.
